# Complete Source Code Files for My Portfolio

This document contains ALL the remaining source code files you need to create. Copy each section into the corresponding file in your project.

## 📁 File Structure Created

```
my-portfolio/
├── .gitignore                         ✅ DONE
├── IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md            ✅ DONE
├── README.md                          ✅ DONE
├── COMPLETE_SOURCE_FILES.md          ✅ DONE (this file)
├── index.html                         ✅ DONE
├── package.json                       ✅ DONE
│
├── tsconfig.json                      📋 SEE BELOW
├── vite.config.ts                     📋 SEE BELOW
│
└── src/
    ├── main.tsx                       📋 SEE BELOW
        ├── App.tsx                        📋 SEE BELOW
            ├── vite-env.d.ts                 📋 SEE BELOW
                │
                    ├── components/
                        │   ├── GoldenGate3D.tsx           📋 SEE BELOW
                            │   ├── Hero.tsx                   📋 SEE BELOW
                                │   ├── Portfolio.tsx              📋 SEE BELOW
                                    │   ├── Skills.tsx                 📋 SEE BELOW
                                        │   └── Contact.tsx                📋 SEE BELOW
                                            │
                                                └── styles/
                                                        ├── App.css                    📋 SEE BELOW
                                                                └── animations.css             📋 SEE BELOW
                                                                ```

                                                                ---

                                                                ## 1️⃣ tsconfig.json

                                                                Create file: `tsconfig.json`

                                                                ```json
                                                                {
                                                                  "compilerOptions": {
                                                                      "target": "ES2020",
                                                                          "useDefineForClassFields": true,
                                                                              "lib": ["ES2020", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
                                                                                  "module": "ESNext",
                                                                                      "skipLibCheck": true,
                                                                                          "esModuleInterop": true,
                                                                                              "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,

                                                                                                  /* Bundler mode */
                                                                                                      "moduleResolution": "bundler",
                                                                                                          "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
                                                                                                              "resolveJsonModule": true,
                                                                                                                  "strict": true,
                                                                                                                      "noImplicitAny": true,
                                                                                                                          "strictNullChecks": true,
                                                                                                                              "strictFunctionTypes": true,
                                                                                                                                  "strictBindCallApply": true,
                                                                                                                                      "strictPropertyInitialization": true,
                                                                                                                                          "noImplicitThis": true,
                                                                                                                                              "alwaysStrict": true,
                                                                                                                                                  "noUnusedLocals": true,
                                                                                                                                                      "noUnusedParameters": true,
                                                                                                                                                          "noImplicitReturns": true,
                                                                                                                                                              "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true
                                                                                                                                                                },
                                                                                                                                                                  "include": ["src"],
                                                                                                                                                                    "references": [{ "path": "./tsconfig.node.json" }]
                                                                                                                                                                    }
                                                                                                                                                                    ```
                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                    ---
                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                    ## 2️⃣ tsconfig.node.json
                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                    Create file: `tsconfig.node.json`
                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                    ```json
                                                                                                                                                                    {
                                                                                                                                                                      "compilerOptions": {
                                                                                                                                                                          "composite": true,
                                                                                                                                                                              "skipLibCheck": true,
                                                                                                                                                                                  "module": "ESNext",
                                                                                                                                                                                      "moduleResolution": "bundler",
                                                                                                                                                                                          "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true
                                                                                                                                                                                            },
                                                                                                                                                                                              "include": ["vite.config.ts"]
                                                                                                                                                                                              }
                                                                                                                                                                                              ```
                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                              ---
                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                              ## 3️⃣ vite.config.ts
                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                              Create file: `vite.config.ts`
                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                              ```typescript
                                                                                                                                                                                              import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
                                                                                                                                                                                              import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'
                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                              export default defineConfig({
                                                                                                                                                                                                plugins: [react()],
                                                                                                                                                                                                  server: {
                                                                                                                                                                                                      port: 5173,
                                                                                                                                                                                                          open: true,
                                                                                                                                                                                                              host: true
                                                                                                                                                                                                                },
                                                                                                                                                                                                                  build: {
                                                                                                                                                                                                                      target: 'ES2020',
                                                                                                                                                                                                                          minify: 'terser',
                                                                                                                                                                                                                              sourcemap: false
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                })
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ```
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ---
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ## 4️⃣ src/vite-env.d.ts
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Create file: `src/vite-env.d.ts`
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ```typescript
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                /// <reference types="vite/client" />
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ```
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ---
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ## 5️⃣ src/main.tsx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Create file: `src/main.tsx`
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ```typescript
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                import React from 'react'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                import App from './App.tsx'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                import './styles/App.css'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  <React.StrictMode>
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      <App />
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        </React.StrictMode>,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        )
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ```
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ---
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ## 6️⃣ src/App.tsx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Create file: `src/App.tsx`
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        ```typescript
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        import React from 'react'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        import GoldenGate3D from './components/GoldenGate3D'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        import Hero from './components/Hero'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        import Portfolio from './components/Portfolio'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        import Skills from './components/Skills'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        import Contact from './components/Contact'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        import './styles/App.css'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        function App() {
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          return (
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              <div className="app-container">
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    <GoldenGate3D />
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          <Hero />
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                <Portfolio />
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      <Skills />
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            <Contact />
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                </div>
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  )
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  export default App
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ```
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ---
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ## 7️⃣ src/components/GoldenGate3D.tsx
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Create file: `src/components/GoldenGate3D.tsx`
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  ```typescript
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  import * as THREE from 'three'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  import gsap from 'gsap'
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  const GoldenGate3D: React.FC = () => {
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      useEffect(() => {
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          if (!containerRef.current) return
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              // Scene setup
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  const scene = new THREE.Scene()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            75,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        0.1,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              10000
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  )
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true })
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              renderer.setClearColor(0x0a0e27, 1)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      // Lighting
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          const sunLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xff6b1a, 1.2)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              sunLight.position.set(300, 200, 200)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  scene.add(sunLight)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0x404040, 0.8)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          scene.add(ambientLight)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              // Create Bridge Structure
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  const bridgeGroup = new THREE.Group()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      // Main cables
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          const cableGeometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry()
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              const cablePoints = []
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  for (let i = 0; i <= 100; i++) {
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        const x = (i / 100) * 2000 - 1000
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              const y = 300 + Math.sin((i / 100) * Math.PI) * 200
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    const z = 0
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          cablePoints.push(new THREE.Vector3(x, y, z))
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  cableGeometry.setFromPoints(cablePoints)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      const cableMaterial = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0xff6b1a, linewidth: 3 })
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          const cables = new THREE.Line(cableGeometry, cableMaterial)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              bridgeGroup.add(cables)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  // Bridge deck
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      const deckGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2000, 30, 100)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          const deckMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                color: 0xff6b1a,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      metalness: 0.3,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            roughness: 0.4
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                })
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    const deck = new THREE.Mesh(deckGeometry, deckMaterial)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        deck.position.y = -50
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            bridgeGroup.add(deck)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                // Towers
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    for (let x of [-500, 500]) {
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          const towerGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(50, 400, 50)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                const towerMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        color: 0xff6b1a,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                metalness: 0.4,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        roughness: 0.3
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              })
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    const tower = new THREE.Mesh(towerGeometry, towerMaterial)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          tower.position.set(x, 100, 0)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                bridgeGroup.add(tower)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    }
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        scene.add(bridgeGroup)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            // Water
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                const waterGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(4000, 3000)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    const waterMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          color: 0x1a4d6d,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                metalness: 0.5,
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      roughness: 0.3
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          })
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              const water = new THREE.Mesh(waterGeometry, waterMaterial)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  water.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      water.position.y = -400
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          scene.add(water)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              // Camera position
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  camera.position.set(0, 100, -1000)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      camera.lookAt(0, 100, 0)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          // Animation loop
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              let animationId: number
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  const animate = () => {
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        animationId = requestAnimationFrame(animate)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              // Gentle wave animation
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    water.material.emissiveIntensity = 0.1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.001) * 0.05
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          // Driving animation using GSAP
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                gsap.to(camera.position, {
